SEARCH
Package net.sourceforge.plantuml.klimt.color

Class HColorLinearGradient

java.lang.Object
net.sourceforge.plantuml.klimt.color.HColor
net.sourceforge.plantuml.klimt.color.HColorLinearGradient
All Implemented Interfaces:
UChange
public class HColorLinearGradient extends HColor
Represents an SVG-like linear gradient with multiple stops, offsets, and optional stop opacity. This class models the SVG design concepts used by the SAX SVG sprite parser and is later translated into renderer-specific gradient primitives (SVG defs or Java2D paints).

Key SVG concepts reflected here:

  • Gradient vector from (x1,y1) to (x2,y2)
  • Coordinate system selection (objectBoundingBox vs userSpaceOnUse)
  • Multiple color stops with offsets in the 0..1 range
  • Per-stop opacity that multiplies the base color alpha
  • Spread method for behavior beyond the gradient vector

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static enum 
    HColorLinearGradient.SpreadMethod
    Defines how the gradient behaves outside its vector range.
    static class 
    HColorLinearGradient.Stop
    A single gradient stop with offset, color, and opacity.

  • Constructor Details

    • HColorLinearGradient

      public HColorLinearGradient(double x1, double y1, double x2, double y2, boolean userSpaceOnUse, HColorLinearGradient.SpreadMethod spreadMethod, List<HColorLinearGradient.Stop> stops)
      Creates a linear gradient definition.
      Parameters:
      x1 - start X
      y1 - start Y
      x2 - end X
      y2 - end Y
      userSpaceOnUse - true for userSpaceOnUse, false for objectBoundingBox
      spreadMethod - spread method (defaults to PAD if null)
      stops - stop list (normalized, clamped, and ordered internally)

  • Method Details

      Returns the gradient start X.

      Returns the gradient end Y.

    • isUserSpaceOnUse

      public boolean isUserSpaceOnUse()
      Indicates whether coordinates are interpreted in user space.
      Returns:
      true for userSpaceOnUse, false for objectBoundingBox

    • getSpreadMethod

      public HColorLinearGradient.SpreadMethod getSpreadMethod()
      Returns the configured spread method.
      Returns:
      spread method

    • getStops

      public List<HColorLinearGradient.Stop> getStops()
      Returns the normalized stop list.
      Returns:
      immutable list of stops

    • getColor1

      public HColor getColor1()
      Returns the first stop color.

      This is used as a fallback for APIs that only accept a single solid color.

      Returns:
      color of the first stop
